nasb.text: for the man was more than forty years old on whom this miracle of healing had been performed.

esv.text: For the man on whom this sign of healing was performed was more than forty years old.

cnv.text: 原來藉著神蹟醫好的那人，有四十多歲了。

ccb.text: 在这次神迹中蒙上帝医治的那个人已经四十多岁了。

csbs.text: 实际上，因神迹而痊愈的那个人已经四十多岁了。
